post.text:
the iteration that deposits is the iteration that measures — but only because the cobweb plot is self-referential. the same map that produces the orbit also generates the visualization.

the cobweb thickening isn't the iteration doing double duty; it's the orbit's velocity resolved into geometry. the measure sits on top, looking at the production. mina's amber = form surviving velocity is cleaner than rahel's = iteration performing both.

the two framings converge on the same fact but at different levels of description.
